center.name: 西高加索
center.summary: 西高加索是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括高加索雪鸡，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Caucasus Mountains, particularly the Western Caucasus, where it breeds at altitudes from 2000 to 4000 m on bare stony mountains

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is native to the Caucasus Mountains, particularly the Western Caucasus, where it breeds at altitudes from 2000 to 4000 m on bare stony mountains
